title: Summary: Turn 869
content: Phase 1 of LLM-inferred category system with `_RAW` directory per subject mostly done: created `NotionCategoryInferenceService` (interface, noop, OpenAI). Pending: `ObsidianVaultExportService` and integration into `KnowledgeBaseApplication`. Next step: pick A (export core logic), B (app integration), or C (compile verification).
